mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses the demand for goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening labor markets are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods demand proxy signals a weakening economy, which compresses the supply of goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS falls below 300 million in 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the supply proxy signals an expansion of goods and services, which compresses the demand for goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the goods demand proxy signals an expansion of goods and services, which compresses the supply of goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor market proxy signals a weakening economy, which compresses the demand for goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS falls below 140 million in 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening labor markets are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the goods demand proxy signals an expansion of goods and services, which compresses the supply of goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises above 400 million in 1 month
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the monetary policy proxy signals an easing monetary cycle, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening monetary cycles are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor market proxy signals a strengthening economy, which compresses the demand for goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening labor markets are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
